description_long: This doll features a large, round head with a light brown complexion, decorated with a central orange stripe and two rows of purple dots running from the forehead to the nape. The face is expressive, with wide, slightly asymmetrical eyes, a small nose, and a smiling mouth, along with a bandage and a bruise detail on the left cheek. The doll wears a black jacket adorned with punk-inspired patches, studs, and graphic prints, over a dark shirt and blue jeans with red shoes. The ears are detailed, with one sporting a small hoop earring, and the head is further embellished with a bold black tattoo above the right ear. The figure stands on a hexagonal stone-textured base, giving it a sturdy, display-ready appearance. The overall aesthetic combines urban street style with playful, cartoonish proportions and detailed surface textures.
description: A punk-inspired doll with a large, expressive face, tattooed head, and detailed urban clothing, standing on a hexagonal base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's smiling face, bandage, bruise, and detailed jacket with visible patches and graphics.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ear with a hoop earring, the purple dots and orange stripe on the head, and the jacket's side details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the orange stripe and purple dots, the back of the jacket with graphic prints, and the doll's stance on the base.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals a bold black tattoo above the ear, the other ear without an earring, and more jacket and base details.
attribute_clothing_style: Urban punk style with a black jacket featuring patches, studs, and graphic prints, dark shirt, blue jeans, and red shoes; the jacket and jeans have a distressed, streetwear-inspired look.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with wide, open eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, and a playful, friendly demeanor; a bandage and bruise add character to the face.
attribute_hair_style: Bald head with a central orange stripe and two rows of purple dots, plus a black tattoo above the right ear.
